curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which changes a hardcoded InsecureSkipVerify: true to a configurable field in core/logs/smtp.go sendMail function. The only other file changed (core/logs/alils/request.go) was a cosmetic capitalization fix unrelated to the vulnerability. No sibling files in core/logs/ contain TLS configuration, so no additional locations were added. The pre-assigned class crypto-weakness is correct: CWE-295 (Improper Certificate Validation) and CWE-599 (Missing Validation of OpenSSL Certificate) both describe missing TLS certificate verification.
